nasb.text: He stationed all the people, each man with his weapon in his hand, from the right side of the house to the left side of the house, by the altar and by the house, around the king.

esv.text: And he set all the people as a guard for the king, every man with his weapon in his hand, from the south side of the house to the north side of the house, around the altar and the house.

cnv.text: 他又分派眾民，手中各拿兵器，守在祭壇和殿的四周，從殿的右面到殿的左面，環繞著王。

ccb.text: 耶何耶大安排众民手持兵器，从殿右到殿左，在祭坛和殿周围护卫王，
